docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY COSEY, ALVA AS TO DEFENDANT COSEY, RUTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-25-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COSEY, ALVA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COSEY, RUTH THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST HIS MOTHER FOR REIMBURSMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO DEFENDANT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-05-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COSEY, RUTH
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2010 - JUDGMENT.
